LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS LARRY LISSER AND NANCY LISSER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOVEMBER 19, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 9, 2012 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. (THE MOVING PAPERS HAD ONLY ODD NUMBERED PAGES.) THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS LARRY LISSER AND NANCY LISSER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CASE NUMBER 513818 WITH THE GEICO UIM/UM MOTORSIT CLAIM IS GRANTED. THE TWO PROCEEDINGS ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES IN THIS COURT UNDER MERCURY INS. GROUP V. SUP. CRT. (1998) 19 CAL.4TH 332. LEAD CASE NUMBER IS 513818. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ARBITRATOR KEVIN JOHN HOLL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-30-2012 THROUGH FEB-28-2013.
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS WITH UM MOTORIST CLAIM

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT AGAINST GEICO (UM CLAIM IN CONSOLIDATED CASE)

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Actions
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFFS LARRY LISSER and NANCY LISSER'S Motion To Consolidate Actions, Case Number 513818 with the GEICO UIM/UM MOTORSIT CLAIM - The motion is granted. The two proceedings are consolidated for all purposes in this Court under Mercury Ins. Group v. Sup. Crt. (1998) 19 Cal.4th 332. Lead Case Number is 513818. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/eg

Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Actions
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFFS LARRY LISSER and NANCY LISSER'S Motion To Consolidate Actions IS Continued on the court's own motion to November 19, 2012 for the moving party to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies of its moving papers with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than November 9, 2012 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. (The moving papers had only odd numbered pages.) The Court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)

Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-29-12

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CHAD CARLSON AND EDWARD WESTERMAN'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently pleads a cause of action for fraud. Defendant fails to show that the statements are privileged. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CHAD CARLSON AND EDWARD WESTERMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The fraud cause of action is well-pleaded and supports the prayer for exemplary damages. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CHAD CARLSON AND EDWARD WESTERMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Granted with ten days leave to amend. The fraud cause of action is conclusory and does not allege reliance. The punitive damages allegations are improper without a viable fraud cause of action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Continued To May-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CHAD CARLSON, EDWARD WESTERMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to May 3, 2012 to give defendants an opportunity to comply with Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C. No later than April 27 defendants are required to deliver courtesy copies of their moving papers and the first amended complaint to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has received courtesy copies of opposition and reply papers. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
